sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116295" key="w(rai/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡραία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὡραῖος</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n116295.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὥρα</ref> </xr> (B).</sense> </entryFree>
